subject: Important Notice: Final Security Audit of Your Hosting Account
preview: To ensure safety, complete the account audit now.
body_html:
Dear Host,

To ensure the safety of our global community, we are conducting a mandatory security audit for the upcoming peak travel season. Your account has been selected for this review.

Action Required: Complete the audit below. Failure to complete this by April 1 may result in temporary removal of your listings and account access.

Complete Security Audit
